positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided image: a low-angle outdoor portrait of the same man in a white dress shirt and dark patterned tie, standing against a clear blue sky with snowy mountains low in the background. Preserve the original aspect ratio, composition, identity, clothing, hands, face, tie, sky, and mountain background. The first frame already shows him calmly holding his wrist and adjusting his shirt cuff. During the clip, he makes a small final cuff adjustment with his fingers, blinks once, breathes naturally, and settles with both hands slightly relaxed near the same position by the final frames. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable minimal drift with gentle parallax, keeping the portrait framing and face clear. Add only subtle natural motion: a faint breeze moves small curls of hair, the tie fabric, and the shirt sleeve slightly. Photorealistic, natural sunlight, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable subject shape, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: Do not make him walk away, turn around, remove the tie, change clothes, raise his arms high, start a new large gesture, dramatically tighten the cuff, look away for the whole clip, smile unnaturally, change the mountain background, add clouds, or introduce other people, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, distorted face, deformed hands, extra limbs, extra fingers, changing identity, changing clothes, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden pose change, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, plastic skin, text artifacts, logo distortion
